metadata.title: Fix PR Triage Agent: switch from explicit to automatic GitHub MCP lockdown mode
metadata.author: Copilot

risk_assessment.justification: Changes GitHub Actions workflow security configuration (lockdown mode). Low risk due to: draft status, small changeset (2 files, 15 lines), automatic lockdown logic preserves security when PAT available, fixes existing CI failure.

priority_assessment.justification: Fixes broken PR triage workflow (high value) but draft status and security sensitivity warrant careful review before merge.

key_changes: Changed lockdown: true to lockdown: false in workflow config
Added GITHUB_MCP_LOCKDOWN env var for dynamic lockdown mode
Removed explicit GITHUB_MCP_LOCKDOWN_EXPLICIT and GITHUB_READ_ONLY settings

next_steps: Verify automatic lockdown logic works as intended with and without custom PAT
Confirm workflow runs successfully with lockdown: false
Review security implications of dynamic lockdown mode
Test that lockdown mode still activates when GH_AW_GITHUB_MCP_SERVER_TOKEN is present
Consider marking as ready for review once CI passes
